calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Dec-18-2006 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Dec-18-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Court Trial Prove-Up.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/Gina Gonzales, CSR: Mitch Lyon.
Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. specially appearing for Plaintiff: Resurgence Financial, LLC.
No appearance by Defendant: Timothy J. Gibler.
Declaration of Devin Louerio, Custodian of Records for Resurgence Financial, LLC, in lieu of live testimony received and filed in court.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant: Timothy J. Gibler, as follows:
Damages/Principal $2,790.25. Plaintiff waives costs, prejudgment interest and atty fees, for Total Judgment $2,790.25.
Counsel to prepare and submit Judgment.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-13-2006 Set For Trial On Dec-18-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
